source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/grok-elon-musk-white-genocide-south-africa/

data.title: Billionaire Ken Griffin Warns of Inflationary Pressures Amid President Trump’s Attempt to Onshore Manufacturing
data.description:
Billionaire hedge fund manager Ken Griffin says President Donald Trump’s efforts to bring manufacturing back to the United States will bring inflationary pressure. Griffin argues in a new interview with Bloomberg that Trump should instead be working to keep the “inflation devil in the bottle.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/15/billionaire-ken-griffin-warns-of-inflationary-pressures-amid-president-trumps-attempt-to-onshore-manufacturing/

data.title: Canada lags with stablecoin approach, but there’s room to catch up
data.description:
The slow adoption of stablecoins in Canada has some local crypto industry observers concerned that the country is falling behind. The Canadian Securities Administrators (CSA) classified stablecoins as “securities and/or derivatives” in December 2022 after the FTX debacle that shook markets and turned many lawmakers against the crypto industry. Regulating stablecoins as a security has seen few local stablecoin issuers arise, but in the United States and the European Union, softening regulations have seen significant growth in the stablecoin market. This makes Canada, observers say, less competitive with other jurisdictions
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/canada-lags-stablecoin-approach-room-to-catch-up?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Spot Launches Two NXPC Trading Challenges
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Spot launched two NXPC trading challenge activities. Qualified users will have the opportunity to participate in the 300,000 NXPC equivalent token voucher prize pool.
Event period: 01:00 on May 16, 2025 to 01:00 on May 23, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8). All USD stablecoin trading pairs with zero transaction fees and any other trading pairs with no transaction fees will not be included in the final transaction volume calculation, and the ranking list will be updated every 24 hours.

data.title: US household debt hits all-time high at $18.2 trillion after a $167 billion surge in Q1
data.description:
US household debt ballooned by $167 billion in the first quarter of 2025, bringing the total to a record $18. 2 trillion, according to the New York Federal Reserve’s latest report. Compared to ten years ago, the overall debt held by households has grown by $7 trillion, piling onto families who are already stretched thin. This […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-household-debt-ath-at-18-2-trillion/

data.title: Addentax, a US-listed company, plans to buy 8,000 Bitcoins and mainstream cryptocurrencies such as TRUMP
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed Addentax Group Corp announced that the company has negotiated with some major and influential Bitcoin and other mainstream cryptocurrency holders, and plans to acquire up to 8,000 Bitcoins and other cryptocurrencies, such as TRUMP tokens, at an estimated cost of $800 million, and will complete the financing through the issuance of common stock. No final agreement has been reached yet.
Addentax Group management said that this move is the company's core action to support its long-term investment and holding strategy for crypto assets, strengthening its balance sheet by acquiring highly liquid and widely recognized digital assets, while attracting new shareholders with experience and expertise in the field of cryptocurrencies. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Coinbase fires compromised agents in India — Coinbase CSO
data.description:
Coinbase has reportedly fired a group of customer support agents following their alleged involvement in social engineering attacks on users. The contracted agents were based in India. According to a May 15 Fortune interview, Coinbase's chief security officer, Philip Martin, said the company flagged customer support contractors who allowed scammers access to user data, suggesting they could be Indian nationals. The CSO’s comments came after some crypto users reeled from attempted phishing attacks using their Coinbase data, which the exchange estimated could cost them between $180 million and $400 million in remediation and reimbursement
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/coinbase-social-engineering-agents-india-cso?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: eToro CEO: Decided to reduce focus on cryptocurrencies after meeting with Buffett
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: eToro CEO Yoni Assia said that after meeting with Berkshire Hathaway Chairman Warren Buffett, he re-evaluated his focus on cryptocurrencies and decided to devote more energy to traditional value investing. Yoni Assia had previously been an active advocate of crypto assets, but was inspired by his exchanges with Buffett and began to emphasize the importance of long-term investment and fundamental analysis. He pointed out that although crypto technology has potential, the current market volatility is large and investors should pay more attention to the balance between risk management and asset allocation. eToro has also recently adjusted its business focus and strengthened its support for traditional financial products such as stocks and ETFs to adapt to changing market demands. (The Block)

data.title: CZ: MGX’s $2 billion investment in Binance has nothing to do with TRUMP tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News, CZ, former CEO of Binance, posted on the X platform that he forwarded the video related to Trump's induced question in the interview "A UAE company reached a $2 billion deal with TRUMP cryptocurrency" and said: "This is a typical example of FUD. The questions in the interview are wrong, vague and misleading. If this question refers to MGX's $2 billion investment in Binance, the transaction was completed using USD1 stablecoins, which has nothing to do with TRUMP tokens. TRUMP is just a Meme coin, but this is an investment transaction between investors in Abu Dhabi and a private company. The transaction can be made in any currency, such as Bitcoin, UAE Dirham, US dollars or USD1, which mainly depends on the choice of the payer. The recipient can convert the funds into any other currency after receiving the payment, and Binance provides the best liquidity in the world. FUD, 4. (By the way, there are finally more fiat currencies/stablecoins to buy on dips)."

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows fall, but BTC whale activity points to bull market acceleration
data.description:
Key takeaways:Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows dropped over 90% from $3 billion to $228 million in four weeks. While strong ETF inflows often drive Bitcoin rallies, recent data shows price movements can occur independently. Despite short-term selling pressure, long-term BTC whale buying suggests a potential continuation of the BTC uptrend. The Bitcoin (BTC) market posted a 90+% drop in spot BTC exchange-traded fund (ETF) inflows, falling from $3 billion in the last week of April to just $228 million this week
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/spot-bitcoin-etf-inflows-fall-but-btc-whale-activity-points-to-bull-market-acceleration?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump administration prepares biggest bank capital rollback since 2008
data.description:
According to the Financial Times, the Trump administration is moving forward with a sweeping plan to loosen one of the toughest capital requirements imposed on US banks after the 2008 financial collapse. Officials inside Trump’s White House, along with top regulators, are finalizing a proposal to weaken the supplementary leverage ratio (SLR), a rule that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-biggest-bank-capital-rollback-2008/
